question.label: Next two weeks
question.name: What would make the next two weeks feel steadier for you?
question.description: Closes by turning the conversation into practical adjustments and support.

answer: Clear priority tradeoffs from leadership would help a lot.

assessment.note: Names a missing condition for steadier work — clear priority tradeoffs from leadership — which signals mild strain and reduced clarity.

new_queue.label: Influence bottleneck
new_queue.name: What tends to slow decisions down when you need buy-in?

history.answer_excerpt: I can ship quickly, but I do not always feel the impact is visible.
Feedback on communication landed, and I am still processing it.
I want more room to lead cross-functional discussions earlier.
Clear priority tradeoffs from leadership would help a lot.
The push worked, but I do not want that pace to become normal.
I am less overloaded now, but my calendar is still fragmented.
